business.name: Ali Plumbing and Building Ltd
business.tagline: Reliable Plumbing and Building Solutions Manchester

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Ali came out the same day for an emergency leak and sorted it quickly. Very professional and reasonably priced. Would definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Had a full bathroom fitted by Ali and the team. Brilliant workmanship, tidy workers and finished on time. Really happy with the result.

sample_reviews.author: Mohammed R
sample_reviews.text: Good honest plumber. Fixed our boiler issue and explained everything clearly. Fair pricing and turned up when he said he would.

brand.usp: Ali Plumbing and Building Ltd delivers honest, high-quality plumbing and building services across Manchester, combining expert craftsmanship with transparent pricing and a prompt, reliable service every time.
brand.hero_headline: Manchester's Trusted Plumbing and Building Specialists
brand.about_paragraph: We are Ali Plumbing and Building Ltd, a trusted local trades company based in Manchester M14. We pride ourselves on delivering quality plumbing and building work at fair prices, whether it's a small repair or a full bathroom renovation. Our team is fully insured and Gas Safe registered, so you can have total confidence in every job we carry out.
